3246880.name: City of Dolorosa
3246880.description:
Very dangerous alliances are being forged between the wrong demons.

City of Dolorosa is an interactive fiction and first-person exploration game that blends walking simulator and visual novel elements. Both the environments and characters are hand-drawn using india ink in a colorful and vibrant style. Set in a city of Hell inhabited by bizarre demons, you will be caught up in a battle for power, with several possible endings.

Explore Dolorosa

Dive into an underworld full of quirky characters, and learn about their stories while you figure out your own destiny. Encounter two-dimensional creatures roaming a three-dimensional city, all entirely hand-drawn using india ink.

Get to know your demons

Interact with multiple characters in visual-novel styled conversations with branching dialogues, where your choices may affect the course of your journey. Unveil the main story and the different subplots that surround the inhabitants of Dolorosa.

Discover your fate

You’ve been sentenced to a lifetime in Hell and you still can’t fathom why. Before you know, you’ve found yourself involved in a plot of demonic power succession, of which you’ll play a key role. Wander through the streets of the City of Dolorosa, meet the Five Great Powers and shed light upon your soul’s fate.

Features

  • About 4 hours of goofy words put together - alternating between absurd comedy, satire and horror thriller

  • Hand-drawn india ink graphics

  • Unique character designs based in demonology and a variety of deities

  • Quirky humor and branching dialogues in a visual-novel style

  • 3 main characters to choose from with different personalities

  • Interactive city with lots of secrets to uncover

  • Multiple endings depending on your actions

  • Available languages: Spanish, English and Catalan (more in the future!)
3246880.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 加泰罗尼亚语, 加利西亚语

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
